items.name: Tropical Hibiscus Summer Bag Pink and Orange Gyaru
items.description:
Floral Purse for Summer & Beach Outfits
Stand out with this shoulder bag featuring a tropical sunset gradient, Hawaiian hibiscus flower, and detailed island-inspired patterns. This stylish purse is perfect for summer outfits, beach roleplays, vacation looks, or any tropical-themed avatar. The braided strap and detailed design make it a must-have fashion accessory for sunny adventures. 🌴👜☀️
